title: Optimization Sequence Leads to Functionally Incorrect Synthesis Output in Yosys

features.name: non_standard_constant_range_port_declaration
features.description: Code should include an output port declaration using non-standard constant range syntax with large constants like (32'h971):(32'h0) instead of simple width specification

features.name: signed_wire_with_unusual_constant_range
features.description: Code should include a signed wire declaration with non-standard constant range like (5'h14):(1'h0) specifying both MSB and LSB bounds

features.name: for_loop_with_reg_iterator_in_sequential_block
features.description: Code should include a for loop using a reg variable as iterator inside a sequential always block with posedge clk sensitivity

features.name: mixed_unsigned_signed_cast_in_ternary
features.description: Code should include a ternary expression combining $unsigned and $signed casting with wire comparisons

features.name: complex_bit_slice_with_constant_bounds
features.description: Code should include bit slice operations using constant bounds in both directions like wire5[(4'hd):(4'h8)]

features.name: conditional_reg_assignment_with_reduction_operator
features.description: Code should include a conditional assignment where the condition uses a reduction operator on a bit-slice like ^~wire1[(2'h2):(2'h2)]

features.name: ternary_assignment_to_reg_from_complex_expression
features.description: Code should include a ternary assignment to a reg variable where the true branch uses another ternary and the false branch uses XOR with a constant

features.name: if_statement_with_bit_slice_condition
features.description: Code should include an if statement using a bit slice as condition like reg11[(2'h3):(1'h1)]

features.name: concatenation_assignment_with_reg_replication
features.description: Code should include a concatenation assignment combining multiple regs and a constant like {reg7,reg8,forvar9,reg10,reg11,reg12,reg18,reg100,(1'h0)}

features.name: unsigned_concatenation_from_signed_reg
features.description: Code should include a $unsigned casting applied to a $signed concatenation result in an assignment expression
